requirement_topic.en: Costa Rica INTECO / ARESEP Conformity Assessment Scope for EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: 哥斯达黎加INTECO / ARESEP电动汽车充电桩合格评定适用范围
requirement_topic.zht: 哥斯大黎加INTECO / ARESEP電動汽車充電樁合格評定適用範圍

summary.en: INTECO (Instituto de Normas Técnicas de Costa Rica) is Costa Rica's national standardization body (ISO member) and publishes INTE-series national standards, many of which adopt IEC and ISO standards. Technical regulations (Reglamentos Técnicos de Costa Rica — RTCR) are published in the national gazette La Gaceta and are mandatory when gazetted. A specific mandatory whole-unit RTCR for EV charger product conformity assessment (analogous to the CE marking or a mandatory product CoC scheme) could not be confirmed from official public sources as of 2026-06-14. However, the following conformity pathways are relevant: (1) RTCR 475:2015 Código Eléctrico de Costa Rica is mandatory for electrical installation, encompassing NEC Article 625 EV charging equipment; (2) electrical product imports may be subject to RTCR or MEIC (Ministerio de Economía, Industria y Comercio) product safety requirements; (3) INTECO-accredited conformity assessors may be required by project owners or network operators; (4) Ley 9518 authorises INTECO and ARESEP to develop technical norms for EV charging — exporters should check whether ARESEP has issued specific EV charger resolutions since 2022. Exporters should confirm the exact conformity assessment route with INTECO, MEIC, or an accredited Costa Rican technical assessor before shipment.
summary.zh: INTECO（哥斯达黎加技术标准研究院）是哥斯达黎加国家标准化机构（ISO成员），发布INTE系列国家标准，其中许多采用IEC和ISO标准。技术法规（RTCR——哥斯达黎加技术法规）在国家公报La Gaceta上发布，发布后具有强制性。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方公开来源确认存在针对电动汽车充电桩产品合格评定的具体整机强制性RTCR（类似CE标志或强制性产品CoC方案）。但以下合格评定路径具有参考意义：(1) RTCR 475:2015《哥斯达黎加电气法规》对电气安装具有强制性，涵盖NEC Article 625电动汽车充电设备；(2) 电气产品进口可能受RTCR或经济、工业和商业部（MEIC）产品安全要求约束；(3) 项目业主或网络运营商可能要求INTECO认可的合格评定机构参与；(4) 《9518法》授权INTECO和ARESEP制定电动汽车充电技术标准——出口商应核实ARESEP是否自2022年后已就电动汽车充电桩发布具体决议。出口商在发货前应向INTECO、MEIC或哥斯达黎加认可技术评估机构确认具体合格评定路径。
summary.zht: INTECO（哥斯大黎加技術標準研究院）是哥斯大黎加國家標準化機構（ISO成員），發布INTE系列國家標準，其中許多採用IEC和ISO標準。技術法規（RTCR——哥斯大黎加技術法規）在國家公報La Gaceta上發布，發布後具有強制性。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方公開來源確認存在針對電動汽車充電樁產品合格評定的具體整機強制性RTCR（類似CE標誌或強制性產品CoC方案）。但以下合格評定路徑具有參考意義：(1) RTCR 475:2015《哥斯大黎加電氣法規》對電氣安裝具有強制性，涵蓋NEC Article 625電動汽車充電設備；(2) 電氣產品進口可能受RTCR或經濟、工業和商業部（MEIC）產品安全要求約束；(3) 項目業主或網絡運營商可能要求INTECO認可的合格評定機構參與；(4) 《9518法》授權INTECO和ARESEP制定電動汽車充電技術標準——出口商應核實ARESEP是否自2022年後已就電動汽車充電樁發布具體決議。出口商在發貨前應向INTECO、MEIC或哥斯大黎加認可技術評估機構確認具體合格評定路徑。

standards_or_laws: INTECO — Instituto de Normas Técnicas de Costa Rica (inteco.or.cr) — INTE series national standards
RTCR 475:2015 — Código Eléctrico de Costa Rica (mandatory electrical installation regulation)
MEIC — Ministerio de Economía, Industria y Comercio (meic.go.cr) — product safety and consumer protection
Ley 9518 — authorizes INTECO and ARESEP to develop EV charging technical norms
ARESEP (aresep.go.cr) — resolutions on EV charging tariffs and service rules
Customs and import requirements — Ministerio de Hacienda / DGA

summary.en: China-market chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging system requirements and GB/T 20234 connector standards, with China Compulsory Certification (CCC) applying where the charger falls within CCC scope. China CCC or GB/T test evidence may support engineering review during an INTECO or project-owner conformity assessment process, but does not by itself establish Costa Rica installation approval, ARESEP tariff compliance, or electrical installation code compliance under RTCR 475.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电系统要求及GB/T 20234连接器标准准备文件；如充电桩属于CCC适用范围，则须取得中国强制认证（CCC）。中国CCC或GB/T测试证据可在INTECO或项目业主合格评定过程中支持工程审查，但其本身不能证明哥斯达黎加安装批准、ARESEP电价合规，或RTCR 475下的电气安装规范合规。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電系統要求及GB/T 20234連接器標準準備文件；如充電樁屬於CCC適用範圍，則須取得中國強制認證（CCC）。中國CCC或GB/T測試證據可在INTECO或項目業主合格評定過程中支持工程審查，但其本身不能證明哥斯大黎加安裝批准、ARESEP電價合規，或RTCR 475下的電氣安裝規範合規。

standards_or_laws: China CCC (3C) mandatory certification where in scope

gap.en: Exporters should map: the Costa Rica importer, HS code, charger type and rated voltage, connector type (J1772 / CCS1 / CHAdeMO), radio or smart-metering functions, ARESEP metering compliance, IEC safety and EMC reports, Spanish-language labelling and manuals, RTCR 475 installation code compliance, and Ley 9518 installation rights before asserting that a charger is Costa Rica-ready. The conformity assessment route for EV chargers (whether MEIC product approval, INTECO certification, or project-owner-acceptance-only) should be confirmed with INTECO or MEIC for the specific product and HS code before shipment.
gap.zh: 出口商在宣称充电桩可进入哥斯达黎加前，应明确：哥斯达黎加进口商、HS编码、充电桩类型和额定电压、接口类型（J1772 / CCS1 / CHAdeMO）、无线或智能计量功能、ARESEP计量合规、IEC安全/EMC报告、西班牙语标签和手册、RTCR 475安装规范合规，以及《9518法》安装授权。应在发货前向INTECO或MEIC确认具体产品和HS编码的电动汽车充电桩合格评定路径（无论是MEIC产品审批、INTECO认证，还是仅需项目业主验收）。
gap.zht: 出口商在宣稱充電樁可進入哥斯大黎加前，應明確：哥斯大黎加進口商、HS編碼、充電樁類型和額定電壓、接口類型（J1772 / CCS1 / CHAdeMO）、無線或智能計量功能、ARESEP計量合規、IEC安全/EMC報告、西班牙語標籤和手冊、RTCR 475安裝規範合規，以及《9518法》安裝授權。應在發貨前向INTECO或MEIC確認具體產品和HS編碼的電動汽車充電樁合格評定路徑（無論是MEIC產品審批、INTECO認證，還是僅需項目業主驗收）。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — RTCR 475:2015 is mandatory for electrical installations; a specific mandatory whole-unit EV charger CoC requirement could not be confirmed as of 2026-06-14; verify with INTECO / MEIC for the specific product HS code and confirm ARESEP resolutions on EV charging before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or recommended depending on China CCC scope; GB/T evidence is not an INTECO / RTCR conformity substitute

source.publisher: INTECO — Instituto de Normas Técnicas de Costa Rica

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim automatic Costa Rica market access from China CCC or GB/T reports alone. Verify the conformity assessment route for the specific product HS code with INTECO / MEIC, address IEC safety and EMC evidence, confirm J1772 / CCS1 connector requirements, ensure RTCR 475 installation compliance, prepare Spanish-language documentation, and verify Ley 9518 installation rights with ARESEP before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国CCC或GB/T报告宣称自动满足哥斯达黎加市场准入。应向INTECO / MEIC核实具体产品HS编码的合格评定路径，处理IEC安全/EMC证据，确认J1772 / CCS1接口要求，确保RTCR 475安装合规，准备西班牙语文件，并在发货前向ARESEP核实《9518法》安装授权。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國CCC或GB/T報告宣稱自動滿足哥斯大黎加市場准入。應向INTECO / MEIC核實具體產品HS編碼的合格評定路徑，處理IEC安全/EMC證據，確認J1772 / CCS1接口要求，確保RTCR 475安裝合規，準備西班牙語文件，並在發貨前向ARESEP核實《9518法》安裝授權。

requirement_topic.en: Costa Rica EV Policy — Ley 9518, Americas EV Market Leadership, and Renewable Grid Context
requirement_topic.zh: 哥斯达黎加电动汽车政策——《9518法》、美洲电动汽车市场领先地位及可再生能源电网背景
requirement_topic.zht: 哥斯大黎加電動汽車政策——《9518法》、美洲電動汽車市場領先地位及可再生能源電網背景

summary.en: Costa Rica enacted Ley 9518 (Ley de Incentivos y Promoción para el Transporte Eléctrico) in 2018, establishing tax incentives, non-fiscal benefits (traffic exemptions, preferential parking), and a framework for EV charging infrastructure expansion. Key elements: (1) EV market leadership — Costa Rica achieved 15.4% BEV market share in 2024 (record 11,373 units sold, up 80% from 2023), the highest pure-electric share in the Americas for the third consecutive year; (2) Grid cleanliness — Costa Rica generated ≈98.6% of its electricity from renewable sources in 2025 (hydro 76%, wind 12%, geothermal 11%, with solar and biomass growing), making EV charging genuinely low-carbon and a legitimate environmental selling point; (3) Infrastructure expansion — ICE plans to install 230 new charging points in 2025–2026, including remote and border regions; (4) Ley 9518 sunset clauses triggered on 1 July 2025: selective consumption tax on EVs rose from 0% to 7.5% and the annual marchamo (road tax) discount dropped from 60% to 40%, which slowed EV sales growth in H2 2025; (5) Legislative reform (Expediente 24.171) proposes to open fast-charger installation rights to private operators — as of 2026-06-14, the status of this bill should be confirmed with the Asamblea Legislativa. Despite the tax change, Costa Rica remains one of Latin America's most active EV markets and a credible import destination for standards-compliant EV charging equipment.
summary.zh: 哥斯达黎加于2018年颁布《9518法》（电动交通激励与促进法），建立了税收优惠、非财政激励（免交通管制、优先停车）及电动汽车充电基础设施扩张框架。主要内容：(1) 电动汽车市场领先——哥斯达黎加2024年实现15.4%纯电动汽车市场份额（创纪录销售11,373辆，同比2023年增长80%），连续第三年成为全美洲纯电动汽车渗透率最高的国家；(2) 电网清洁度——哥斯达黎加2025年约98.6%的电力来自可再生能源（水电76%、风电12%、地热11%，太阳能和生物质能占比持续增长），使电动汽车充电真正实现低碳，也是合理的环保卖点；(3) 基础设施扩张——ICE计划2025—2026年新增230个充电点，包括偏远地区和边境地区；(4) 《9518法》日落条款于2025年7月1日触发：电动汽车选择性消费税从0%升至7.5%，年度marchamo（道路税）折扣从60%降至40%，导致2025年下半年电动汽车销售增速放缓；(5) 立法改革（文件编号24.171）提议向私营运营商开放快充站安装权——截至2026年6月14日，该议案现状应向立法议会核实。尽管税收发生变化，哥斯达黎加仍是拉丁美洲最活跃的电动汽车市场之一，也是符合标准的电动汽车充电设备的可信进口目的地。
summary.zht: 哥斯大黎加於2018年頒布《9518法》（電動交通激勵與促進法），建立了稅收優惠、非財政激勵（免交通管制、優先停車）及電動汽車充電基礎設施擴張框架。主要內容：(1) 電動汽車市場領先——哥斯大黎加2024年實現15.4%純電動汽車市場份額（創紀錄銷售11,373輛，同比2023年增長80%），連續第三年成為全美洲純電動汽車滲透率最高的國家；(2) 電網清潔度——哥斯大黎加2025年約98.6%的電力來自可再生能源（水電76%、風電12%、地熱11%，太陽能和生物質能占比持續增長），使電動汽車充電真正實現低碳，也是合理的環保賣點；(3) 基礎設施擴張——ICE計劃2025—2026年新增230個充電點，包括偏遠地區和邊境地區；(4) 《9518法》日落條款於2025年7月1日觸發：電動汽車選擇性消費稅從0%升至15.4%，年度marchamo（道路稅）折扣從60%降至40%，導致2025年下半年電動汽車銷售增速放緩；(5) 立法改革（文件編號24.171）提議向私營運營商開放快充站安裝權——截至2026年6月14日，該議案現狀應向立法議會核實。儘管稅收發生變化，哥斯大黎加仍是拉丁美洲最活躍的電動汽車市場之一，也是符合標準的電動汽車充電設備的可信進口目的地。

standards_or_laws: Ley 9518 — Ley de Incentivos y Promoción para el Transporte Eléctrico (2018, Costa Rica)
Reglamento de la Ley 9518 — implementing regulations
Costa Rica Nationally Determined Contribution (NDC) — climate and decarbonisation targets
ICE Relectric EV charging expansion plan 2025–2026 (grupoice.com)
CleanTechnica / SNIT (Sindicato Nacional de Ingenierías de Tránsito) — EV market data 2024

summary.en: China's national EV infrastructure expansion is governed by the New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan (2021–2035) and related state grid and charging-station standards. China's domestic push does not translate into automatic Costa Rica market access; Chinese manufacturers must separately satisfy Costa Rica's connector standards (J1772 / CCS1), voltage and frequency compatibility (120/240 V, 60 Hz), ARESEP regulatory compliance, Ley 9518 installation framework, and INTECO / RTCR conformity requirements even when their home-market volumes are large.
summary.zh: 中国国家电动汽车基础设施扩张由《新能源汽车产业发展规划（2021—2035年）》及相关国家电网和充电站标准管理。中国国内推广不能自动转换为哥斯达黎加市场准入；中国制造商即便国内销量很大，仍须单独满足哥斯达黎加的接口标准（J1772 / CCS1）、电压和频率兼容性（120/240 V、60 Hz）、ARESEP法规合规、《9518法》安装框架，以及INTECO / RTCR合格评定要求。
summary.zht: 中國國家電動汽車基礎設施擴張由《新能源汽車產業發展規劃（2021—2035年）》及相關國家電網和充電站標準管理。中國國內推廣不能自動轉換為哥斯大黎加市場准入；中國製造商即便國內銷量很大，仍須單獨滿足哥斯大黎加的接口標準（J1772 / CCS1）、電壓和頻率兼容性（120/240 V、60 Hz）、ARESEP法規合規、《9518法》安裝框架，以及INTECO / RTCR合格評定要求。

standards_or_laws: New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan 2021–2035 (China)
China National Development and Reform Commission charging-station requirements

gap.en: Costa Rica's EV market leadership and clean grid create genuine procurement opportunity for standards-compliant AC and DC fast chargers. However, the Ley 9518 tax-sunset impact on sales growth (H2 2025 slowdown) and the pending legislative reform on private fast-charger installation rights introduce market uncertainty. Chinese exporters should: monitor the Asamblea Legislativa for Expediente 24.171 enactment; confirm Ley 9518 installation rights with ARESEP before committing to public fast-charger projects; allocate lead time for IEC testing, SAE J1772 / CCS1 connector redesign, 60 Hz voltage adaptation, RTCR 475 compliance documentation, and Spanish-language manuals; and confirm the INTECO / MEIC product conformity route for the specific HS code.
gap.zh: 哥斯达黎加电动汽车市场领先地位和清洁电网为符合标准的交流和直流快充设备创造了真实采购机会。然而，《9518法》税收日落对销售增长的影响（2025年下半年放缓）以及私营快充站安装权的待决立法改革带来了市场不确定性。中国出口商应：关注立法议会24.171号文件的颁布进展；在承接公共快充项目前向ARESEP确认《9518法》安装授权；为IEC测试、SAE J1772 / CCS1接口重新设计、60 Hz电压适配、RTCR 475合规文件和西班牙语手册预留交货期；并向INTECO / MEIC确认具体HS编码的产品合格评定路径。
gap.zht: 哥斯大黎加電動汽車市場領先地位和清潔電網為符合標準的交流和直流快充設備創造了真實採購機會。然而，《9518法》稅收日落對銷售增長的影響（2025年下半年放緩）以及私營快充站安裝權的待決立法改革帶來了市場不確定性。中國出口商應：關注立法議會24.171號文件的頒布進展；在承接公共快充項目前向ARESEP確認《9518法》安裝授權；為IEC測試、SAE J1772 / CCS1接口重新設計、60 Hz電壓適配、RTCR 475合規文件和西班牙語手冊預留交貨期；並向INTECO / MEIC確認具體HS編碼的產品合格評定路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Policy context — Ley 9518 is the primary legal framework governing EV charging installations and incentives; ARESEP, INTECO, and RTCR technical requirements remain in force independently; Ley 9518 installation-rights restriction on private fast-charger operators was active as of early 2024 (pending legislative change)
mandatory_status.cn: Policy context only — China EV policy does not affect Costa Rica conformity obligations

source.publisher: CleanTechnica (reporting on Costa Rica 2024 EV market data)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Costa Rica's EV market leadership (15.4% BEV share in 2024, Americas leader) and ≈98.6% renewable grid create real procurement demand for IEC / SAE-standard chargers. Chinese exporters should treat the policy and market data as an opportunity signal, not a conformity shortcut, and ensure connector, grid voltage/frequency, safety, ARESEP metering, RTCR installation, and Ley 9518 installation-rights documentation are each addressed before entering Costa Rica projects.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥斯达黎加电动汽车市场领先地位（2024年纯电动汽车份额15.4%，全美洲领先）及约98.6%的可再生能源电网，为IEC / SAE标准充电设备创造了真实采购需求。中国出口商应将政策和市场数据视为机会信号而非合规捷径，在参与哥斯达黎加项目前确保接口、电网电压/频率、安全、ARESEP计量、RTCR安装，以及《9518法》安装授权文件各项均已妥善处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥斯大黎加電動汽車市場領先地位（2024年純電動汽車份額15.4%，全美洲領先）及約98.6%的可再生能源電網，為IEC / SAE標準充電設備創造了真實採購需求。中國出口商應將政策和市場數據視為機會信號而非合規捷徑，在參與哥斯大黎加項目前確保接口、電網電壓/頻率、安全、ARESEP計量、RTCR安裝，以及《9518法》安裝授權文件各項均已妥善處理。
